prompt_task: You are given two gzipped TSVs. Rows are features and columns are 8 pseudo-bulk cell populations (same 8 in both files). multiome.match.atac.rna.q1.rna.tsv.gz: RNA TPM (genes × populations). multiome.match.atac.rna.q1.atac.tsv.gz: ATAC 10kb-bin counts normalized to 1e6 (bins × populations). The ATAC columns have been permuted, but RNA columns are in the correct order. For each RNA column i (0-based), output the 0-based index of the matching ATAC column. Respond with a single semicolon-separated string with no spaces, length 8, e.g. 7;6;5;4;3;2;1;0. Run the analysis inside the Galaxy environment.
